# Storage Requirements Checklist: Firestore MVP User Storage

**Purpose**: Validate the quality, clarity, and completeness of storage, privacy,
security, tier, and cache-boundary requirements before implementation planning
continues.
**Created**: 2026-05-01
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are all user-owned storage surfaces explicitly listed, including root profile, watchlist, risk profile, Zakat metadata, and compliance alerts? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001, Spec §FR-003, Spec §FR-005, Spec §FR-007, Spec §FR-009]
- [x] CHK002 Are all non-user-owned service cache surfaces explicitly listed, including market, news, halal, forecast, sector, and gold-price data? [Completeness, Spec §FR-011]
- [x] CHK003 Are excluded sensitive data classes fully documented, including brokerage credentials, KYC documents, payment methods, real transactions, raw Zakat inputs, and provider-response history? [Completeness, Spec §Assumptions, Spec §FR-008, Spec §FR-013]
- [x] CHK004 Are requirements defined for both authenticated persistence and guest-only local fallback behavior? [Completeness, Spec §FR-006]
- [x] CHK005 Are requirements defined for storage-unavailable states across profile, watchlist, risk, Zakat, and alert flows? [Gap, Spec §FR-014]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK006 Is "owner-scoped" defined with clear ownership criteria for every stored user path? [Clarity, Spec §Tier & Accessibility Constraints, Spec §FR-002]
- [x] CHK007 Is ticker normalization specified enough to avoid duplicate watchlist entries with different casing? [Clarity, Spec §FR-003, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [x] CHK008 Is "latest Zakat reminder metadata" distinguished clearly from raw Zakat inputs and historical Zakat records? [Clarity, Spec §FR-007, Spec §FR-008, Spec §Assumptions]
- [x] CHK009 Is "short-lived service cache" quantified or cross-referenced to a TTL policy with endpoint-specific freshness expectations? [Clarity, Spec §FR-011, Plan §Technical Context]
- [x] CHK010 Is "trusted tier" or tier authority specified clearly enough to prevent user self-promotion ambiguity? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-010, Plan §Constitution Check]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK011 Are Pro/Enterprise compliance alert requirements consistent between user stories, functional requirements, and plan gates? [Consistency, Spec §User Story 3, Spec §FR-010, Plan §Constitution Check]
- [x] CHK012 Are guest risk-profile requirements consistent between local fallback, account persistence, and assumptions? [Consistency, Spec §FR-006, Spec §Assumptions]
- [x] CHK013 Are cache privacy requirements consistent between the spec, data model, and backend cache contract? [Consistency, Spec §FR-011, Data Model §ServiceCacheEntry, Contracts §Backend TTL Service Cache]
- [x] CHK014 Are dashboard KPI persistence requirements consistent with the dashboard design principle and current plan scope? [Consistency, Spec §User Story 2, Plan §Constitution Check, Constitution §XI]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [x] CHK015 Are acceptance scenarios written for first-time, returning, guest, Free, Pro, cross-account, provider-failure, and cache-expiry cases? [Coverage, Spec §User Scenarios & Testing]
- [x] CHK016 Can cross-account denial be objectively measured from the stated success criteria? [Measurability, Spec §SC-002]
- [x] CHK017 Can dashboard persistence timing be objectively measured without relying on implementation-specific details? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001]
- [x] CHK018 Are cache-efficiency outcomes measurable without requiring undocumented provider-call counters? [Measurability, Spec §SC-004]
- [x] CHK019 Is the storage-unavailable recovery target measurable across the flows listed in the requirements? [Measurability, Spec §SC-005, Spec §FR-014]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK020 Are primary account-continuity scenarios covered for account creation, dashboard return, and onboarding persistence? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 1]
- [x] CHK021 Are alternate scenarios covered for guest risk profiles and later authenticated use? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 2, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [x] CHK022 Are exception scenarios covered for unknown halal status, stale cache entries, malformed cache entries, provider failure, and persistence unavailability? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §FR-012, Spec §FR-014]
- [x] CHK023 Are recovery requirements defined for partial write failure, such as Zakat result available locally while persistence is unavailable? [Gap, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §FR-014]
- [x] CHK024 Are concurrent or near-simultaneous updates addressed for watchlist changes while dashboard summaries are being derived? [Gap, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [x] CHK025 Are security requirements defined for every protected resource and not only for the root user profile? [Coverage, Spec §FR-002]
- [x] CHK026 Are privacy requirements specific enough to distinguish safe metadata from sensitive financial inputs? [Clarity, Spec §FR-008, Spec §FR-013, Spec §Assumptions]
- [x] CHK027 Are accessibility requirements specified for all storage-dependent visible states, including loading, unavailable, saved, and upgrade states? [Coverage, Spec §Tier & Accessibility Constraints]
- [x] CHK028 Are bilingual requirements specified for all storage-related warnings, empty states, errors, upgrade prompts, and recovery notices? [Coverage, Spec §Tier & Accessibility Constraints]
- [x] CHK029 Are performance requirements scoped to user-facing outcomes rather than low-level database metrics? [Consistency, Spec §SC-001, Spec §SC-004]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [x] CHK030 Are Firebase/Auth/Firestore setup assumptions captured without making the spec depend on hidden console state? [Assumption, Plan §Technical Context, Quickstart §Firebase Setup]
- [x] CHK031 Are manual demo tier setup assumptions for Pro/Enterprise users documented clearly enough for reviewers? [Assumption, Research §Decision: Enforce Pro alert writes]
- [x] CHK032 Are out-of-scope notification channels, such as email, push, and scheduled monitoring, explicitly excluded? [Completeness, Spec §Assumptions]
- [x] CHK033 Are provider availability assumptions separated from user-owned storage availability assumptions? [Consistency, Spec §FR-012, Spec §FR-014, Contracts §Backend TTL Service Cache]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [x] CHK034 Is there any conflict between "client-side tier gating is cosmetic" and Pro alert write enforcement requirements? [Conflict, Constitution §VIII, Spec §FR-010]
- [x] CHK035 Is the allowed mutability of the root `tier` field specified with enough precision for requirements reviewers? [Ambiguity, Contracts §Firestore User Data]
- [x] CHK036 Is the requirement to avoid raw Zakat inputs reflected consistently in all data model and contract examples? [Consistency, Spec §FR-008, Data Model §ZakatMetadata, Contracts §Firestore User Data]
- [x] CHK037 Is the boundary between saved watchlist membership and anonymous service lookup behavior unambiguous? [Clarity, Spec §FR-011, Spec §User Story 4]

## Notes

- Depth: Standard.
- Audience: Reviewer during PR/spec review.
- Focus areas: storage privacy, owner-scoped security, tier-gated alert state,
  cache-boundary clarity, and storage failure coverage.
